guide: �7Recommended for this is to fish in the
�7Backwater Bayou with the best rod you have
�7access to and full Angler Set or better.
�7The easiest solution for this is the Jerry pet.
�7To get the Enchanted Egg needed, kill Chickens
�7in The Barn till you get the Chicken Head recipe.
�7Once you get your first Enchanted Egg, use it
�7to craft your pet.
�7Craft some easy minions while also getting
�7those that will help with this Bingo.
�7Use NPC shops to buy materials for easy crafts.
�7You can find Relic Coordinates in Skytils
�7or the Wiki. Some of them will require
�7the use of some Ender Pearls.
�7Kill Spiders in the Spider's Den (/warp spider)
�7place a few Spider Minions and participate
�7in killing Arachne in Arachne's Sanctuary.
�7Recommended to wear a Cow Head to avoid the poison.
�7For the Minions, dont forget to give them the best
�7fuel and storage you have access to. Collect in time!
�7Complete a Floor 1 with a score of 230+
�7and buy the chest afterwards. If you can't buy
�7immediately, either save money and buy it from
�7Croesus within the next 2 days or do another run.
�7You will probably need help with this.
�7To get easy progress in this do
�7contests like Wheat, Potato
�7or Carrot as those are easy
�7Bronze or Silver Medals to get.
�7You can also try to utilize pests to help here.
�7Optimal tool:
�7Golden Axe with Efficiency 5
�7Reforges: Double-Bit or Lush
�7Get Haste 3 from a splash to instamine wood
�7Forage in the Hub for this.
�7Place as many minions as you can
�7give them a medium storage and the best fuel
�7you can. Collect them in time.
�7Recommended for this either Revenant Horror II
�7or Tarantula Broodfather II. Use your Ender Armor
�7and Void Sword (200k) for this.
�7You will most likely be able to complete this
�7from doing the Emerald Treasure Goal as there
�7is a high chance for a t6 Enchanted Book to be
�7in the given Reward Chests.
�7The easiest solution here would be
�7to craft a Wheat Minion t11 (83.232 Wheat).
�7Utilize the Garden and its pests
�7to obtain the needed resources.
�7Kill goblins or open loot chests in
�7the Crystal Hollows and throw the eggs
�7until you get a Golden Goblin.
�7Higher level eggs have higher chances of
�7spawning, but are also rarer to get.
�7You should use SkyHanni's Trapper features
�7to make this easier. Use /warp trapper
�7to get back to Trevor whenever you want.
�7You will need a bow for this.
�7Brew an Absorption IV potion with an
�7Enchanted Gold and combine it with a Glowstone.
�7You can get that Glowstone by buying one block
�7from the Builder and breaking it on your island.
�7Look for mobs with a purple name
�7and kill it.
�7Start an Entrance floor and
�7play Mage/Tank/Berserker to use
�7their abilities to kill a Lost Adventurer.
�7You only need to get the last hit,
�7so you can get help from your team.
�7You need Combat Level 15 for this.
�7To help with this, try to make bigger crafts
�7by hand for Carpentry levels.
�7Use the Enchanted Sugar that you may get from
�7pests/the Garden to brew Speed Potions.
�7Also do your daily experiments and make sure
�7to have a pet active at all times
�7(any pet works, even level 100).
�7Wear armor enchanted with Growth 5
�7(Enchanting Level 5), preferably Ender Armor
�7while you're in The End or Mushroom Armor
�7during the night.
�7Applying Growth 5 costs 50 Levels each.
�7If you still struggle, reforge your
�7armor to Titanic.
�7For this pretty much all ores count, just
�7things like Cobblestone/Stone don't. For faster
�7progress here you'll want to use as much
�7Mining Speed and Spread as possible
�7and pair it with the Pickobulus
�7pickaxe ability that unlocks at HotM 3.
�7Get yourself a splash, equip a Bingo Pet
�7and get the cake buff by eating the cakes
�7on xMeru's, skyerzz's or prtl's island.
�7If this doesn't finish it,
�7get a Void Sword (200k) in the End
�7and hold it while wearing Ender Gear.
�7Ways to obtain:
�7Craft (Lapis Lazuli Collection 5),
�7a drop from fishing,
�7from the Experimentation Table,
�7drop from Ender Nodes in the End (11-13%).
�7Optimal tool:
�7Advanced Gardening Hoe (25 copper)
�7Make a full plot of carrots (7896 needed)
�7in The Garden (SkyBlock Level 5)
�7Get the carrots to plant from The Barn
�7or from the cave under the mountain in The Hub.
�7Do your daily commissions in the Dwarven Mines
�7(4 per day). You will need Mining 12 for this.
�7Can also be completed in the Crystal Hollows,
�7though it might be harder to do so.
�7Recommended for this is either Zombie
�7or Spider Slayer. You will need a total
�7of 6220 XP for that Slayer.
�7Recommended gear for this is Ender Armor
�7and a Void Sword or you can rely
�7on help from friends.
�7You can get easy contribution for
�7this by breaking some Wheat in the Hub.
�7If you want faster contribution,
�7make a Sugar Cane farm in your Garden.
�7You will gain passive progress in this
�7by doing the At your service goal.
�7Higher Rarity Visitors grant more Copper
�7but are also harder to complete.
�7Those have a 20% drop chance from Trash Gobblers
�7in the Backwater Bayou (11.3% base catch chance)
�7and require Fishing Level 5+ to fish up.
�7Use the best Fishing Gear you have access to.
�7Pest spawns have a cooldown of 5 minutes while online
�7and an hour while offline. While actively farming, there's
�7a 0.2% chance of a pest spawn each broken mature crop.
�7Bonus Pest Chance can increase the amount of spawned pests
�7at once while actively farming. You can also use up to 3
�7Pest Traps (purchased from Philip in the Garden) to get Pests
�7while doing other goals. Pests unlock from Garden Level 5.
�7Use the Vacuum Philip hands you when talking to him.
�7Use a Super Cleaver from Ophelia in the Dungeon Hub
�7(80k coins + Cleaver to buy)
�7or a Dreadlord Sword from Dungeons to achieve this.
�7Make sure to apply Cleave 5 on your Cleaver.
�7�cSpiders on your Private Island don't count!
�7Theres a couple different ways to achieve this.
�7You'll start with a base of 480s Rift Time and things like:
�7  Wyld Armor (60s), Crux Talisman (10s), Rift Necklace (60s),
�7  Montezuma Pet (15s), Enigma Cloak (100-200s, depending on
�7  how many souls you get), Rift Time Century Cake (10s,
�7  /visit skyerzz to get this), Scarf's Studies (10s)
�7can increase that time.
�7You only need to get the final hit on it
�7for this to count, so ideally you team up
�7with other Bingo Players or get your friends
�7to lower it. You need Combat 20 to enter the
�7portal under the entrance plattform in the
�7Dragon Area in the End. If you want to kill one
�7entirely by yourself, get 6+/8 pieces of the Ender Gear,
�7a Void Sword with Ender Slayer 5+ and an elevated spot.
�7You'll want to use any kind of bait
�7that boosts chances for rarer Sea Creatures
�7such as Dark/Light Bait and others. Some of
�7them have conditions for the boost to work.
�7Probably the best idea to do this once you have
�7Bayou Bobbin' done. Use the best rod you
�7have access to.
�7This unlocks at 50k Bone Collection.
�7Kill Skeletons in The Deep Caverns
�7to unlock Skeleton Minions. Craft as many
�7as you can and place them on your island.
�7Give them the best fuel and storage
�7that you have access to and collect in time.
�7Don't forget to buy your daily bones from
�7The Adventurer in The Hub.
�7You'll need 192 Enchanted Bones and Enchanted String
�7to craft this, so you'll want to also run Spider Minions.
�7Do your daily Experimentation Tables after getting
�7Enchanting Level 10 and don't forget to make use
�7of the Minigames that unlock after Enchanting 20.
�7This will need Combat 15 to enter any Dungeon.
�7Almost all Dungeon Rooms have a couple secrets,
�7some of the may require Ender Pearls to reach.
�7The Secret Tracker 3000 from Malik can help
�7if you have trouble finding secrets.
�7You can easily get t2 in the following:
�7  17x Farming, 16x Mining,
�7  7x Combat and 12x Foraging
�7This will need Heart of the Mountain Tier 2
�7and 12 Enchanted Mithril to forge all 4 pieces.
�7Each piece has only a forge time of an hour.
�7You will gain passive progress in the while doing
�7various other goals. Recommended for this are
�7Endermen. Don't forget to unlock Combat Wisdom
�7perks in the related Essence Shop.
�7For this you'll need to fish in the Backwater Bayou.
�7Recommended to go for is:
�7  Bronze Ship Helm: 64 Dark Oak Wood + 4 Bronze Bowl
�7    (Bronze Bowl is a 1/23 drop from Dumpster Divers)
�7  Bronze Engine: 64 Rusty Coins + 8 Busted Belt Buckles
�7    (You'll need Junker Joels Junk Sinker for this and
�7    he's also the one that's selling the part.)
�7There's a couple ways to achieve this:
�7  Mining Level (4 each), Fortune 3+ Enchant (45),
�7  Mithril Equipment (25), Mining Tool Base Stat (2+),
�7  Century Cake (5 from /visit skyerzz),
�7  Mining Fortune HotM2 Perk (2/tier),
�7  Better Together Dwarven Event (50, if 1+ person near),
�7  Goblin/Lapis Armor (8/16)
�7You'll want to forge a Ruby Drill TX-15 (HotM4),
�7which needs 6 Fine Ruby Gems, a Fuel Canister (10h Forge Time)
�7and a Drill Motor (44h total Forge time). Once you gathered
�7all the materials, it needs 4h Forge Time.
�7Recommended for this is any rod with the best
�7Fishing Speed you can get and Blessing 5+ Enchant.
�7If you want, you can further boost your chances
�7by using a Rare+ Hermit Crab Pet.
�7You might also want to do this in the Tomb Floodway
�7on Galatea as you won't catch Sea Creatures there.
�7If you fish in the Backwater Bayou, use the Junk Sinker
�7from Joel as it awards Treasure Chance. You can go even
�7further and buy a Junk Talisman or better from Joel
�7in case you have those resources as spare.
�7Open the Chocolate Factory Menu with /cf,
�7get your first 50 Chocolate by clicking the button
�7in the middle of it and buy your first Level of
�7Rabbit Bro. Remember to check in every once in a while
�7and upgrade your workers. You can also grab
�7Chocolate Meal Eggs that spawn while Hoppity's Hunt is
�7around to further speed this up.
�7You can do Dwarven Mines/Crystal Hollows/Glacite Tunnel
�7Commissions for that, while some may be harder than others.
�7Make sure to not miss Active Event related goals
�7in the Dwarven Mines, as those are rather quick and will
�7also help towards the Dwarven Cereals.
�7Easy Visitors to go for are Jotraeline Greatforge
�7and Gold Forger as they don't ask for much each visit.
�7Other good choices to go for is the Librarian and any
�7visitor that wants Wheat like Jacob does.
�7(check the Wiki for more insight) Those can queue up to
�75 visitors total at a time without you
�7needing to be online.
�7This will heavily rely on your gear and Catacombs Level.
�7Ideally you'll want to buy the best tier of Goggles from
�7Ophelia that you can. Use End Armor for the remaining 3 pieces
�7but replace them with better Dungeon Armor drops.
�7Reforge your Armor to Wise or Necrotic if you can
�7and your Dreadlord Sword to Heroic. Star your Dungeon Gear.
�7You should also use the Power Stone that grants the most
�7Intelligence that you have access to.
�7�cDon't forget to use your Class Abilities!
�7For this you'll need to fish in the Backwater Bayou.
�7Any 4 pieces will do, the equipment is the cheapest.
�7This requires Angler Armor (bought in the Hub) and at least
�732 Rusty Coins (Junk catch that requires the Junk Sinker
�7from Joel to be applied to your rod)
�7List of more than 30 talismans:
�7  Buy all 6 Talismans from the Adventurer in The Hub (26k)
�7Collection Talismans:
�7  Farming Talisman, Vaccine Talisman,
�7  Gravity Talisman, Talisman of Coins, Magnetic Talisman,
�7  Wood Affinity Talisman, Speed Talisman, Potion Affinity Talisman,
�7  Small Fish Bowl, Pressure Talisman, Talisman of Power,
�7  Haste Ring, Emerald Ring
�7Others:
�7  Archaeologists Compass, Shiny Yellow Rock, King Talisman,
�7  Campfire Initiate Badge, Cat Talisman, Spider Talisman,
�7  Soul Campfire Initiate Badge, Runeblade Talisman,
�7  Moonglade Talisman, New Year Cake Bag, Candy Talisman,
�7  Pig's Foot, Wolf Paw, Pesthunter Talisman
�7Don't forget to take the 4 Bonus accessory bag slots from
�7the Redstone Miner, he needs 1920 Redstone in total.
�7Those have a 20% chance to drop if you participate
�7in Active Dwarven Mines Events such as Goblin Raid,
�7Raffle or Mithril Gourmand.
�7The chance goes up to 36% if you get the personal bonus.
�7Apply/Use the highest tier of Scavenger
�7that you can get your hands on and put it
�7on your main weapon. Gifts from the Jerry Island
�7can be a way to obtain Scavenger IV books.
�7You can also use the weapon drops from dungeon mobs
�7as those have guaranteed Scavenger 5.
�7Once you acquire a Void Sword and a decent
�7armor like Ender or Glacite this should be
�7fairly easy to do.
�7You should use SkyHanni's Trapper features
�7to make this easier. Use /warp trapper
�7to get back to Trevor whenever you want.
�7You will need a bow for this.
�7Kill Slimes in the Deep Caverns and
�7place as many Slime Minions as you can.
�7Give them the best fuel and storage
�7you have access to.
�7Remember to collect in time!
�7You will get the Rock Pet by mining 2.5k
�7Ore Blocks. Keep in mind that Stone doesn't
�7count for this. Don't forget to equip the pet ;)
�7This unlocks at 10k Mushroom Collection.
�7You can get that by farming the Mushrooms
�7in the Mushroom Desert.
�7For the Enchanted Glowstone you'll need
�7to either farm Witches on your island
�7to unlock the minion or get Combat 22
�7and mine it yourself.
�7Recommended for this either Revenant Horror II
�7or Tarantula Broodfather II. Use your Ender Armor
�7and Void Sword (200k) for this.
�7For this you will need Combat 15.
�7To blow up crypts you can use
�7class abilities (Tank, Archer, Mage)
�7and/or Superboom TNTs that drop
�7from slaying Minibosses in dungeons
�7and can be bought from Walther in
�7The Deep Caverns or Ophelia in
�7The Dungeon Hub.
�7Kill Sheeps in the Desert Island (/warp desert)
�7place as many Sheep Minions as you can and
�7give them the best fuel and storage you have
�7access to. Remember to collect them in time.
�7Claim your cake buff (visit skyerzz, nightlibra or prtl),
�7hold an angler 4+ rod and visit someone with a
�7Sea Creature Chance beacon (visit ReyMaratov).
�7Mine Pure Lapis Lazuli in the Dwarven Mines
�7with a Fortune 3+ pickaxe.
�7You'll want to get as much Mining Speed, Spread,
�7and Fortune as you can.
�7You might want to use as many minions
�7as you have access to for this.
�7Remember to put a compactor in the minions
�7when you plan on leaving for a while.
�7Don't forget to fuel the minions,
�7give them storages and collect them in time.
�7For this you'll want to use the Spider Hat
�7as it costs 95 Spider Essence and 35k coins
�7to apply 5 Stars to it. Use Mort in
�7The Dungeon Hub or Hub to apply them.
�7Start an Entrance floor and play Mage/Tank/Berserker to use
�7the classes abilities to kill a Lost Adventurer.
�7You only need to get the last hit
�7on it to count, so you can get help from your team.
�7You need Combat Level 15 to join a Dungeon.
�7For this you need Combat 15 and you'll
�7likely want friends or other players
�7to help you with it.
�7This needs 47,425 Alchemy XP. You'll want to
�7use Enchanted Sugar or Gold for this (~95 items)
�7or you use an Enchanted Sugar Cane or Gold Block.
�7Talk to Jamie in the Hub and
�7claim the Rogue Sword from him.
�7Right click it to gain +100 Speed,
�7or just wait for a splash.
�7Depending on your Bingo Rank, Alixers
�7Splash might also be enough for this.
�7You will most likely get this
�7from leveling up skills.
�7Remember to actually put the money
�7you get in the Bank :)
�7Wear Ender Armor enchanted with Growth 5
�7and wear it in The End.
�7You can also enchant Mushroom Armor like that
�7and wear it in The Garden.
�7Growth 5 requires Enchanting Level 5
�7and costs 50 Experience Levels per piece.
�7Reforge your armor to Titanic if needed.
�7Craft some easy minions while also getting
�7those that will help with this Bingo.
�7Use NPC shops to buy materials for easy crafts.
�7You will gain passive progress in this
�7by having a pet equipped at all times.
�7Even a Lvl 100 pet counts for this.
�7Get yourself a splash, equip a Bingo Pet
�7and get the cake buff by eating the cakes
�7on skyerzz's or prtl's island.
�7If this doesn't finish it, get a Void Sword (200k) in the End
�7and hold it while some Ender Armor and/or Equipment.
�7Follow the Romero Questline until you
�7get this. You will only need
�71 Yellow Rock, 15 poppies and 64 Emerald.
�7You can get this from Reward Chests
�7at the end of a dungeon run, from
�7the Experimentation Table or from
�7opening gifts from the Winter Island.
�7Recommended for this is Zombie
�7Slayer. You'll need a t1 and a t2 kill.
�7Recommended gear for this is Ender Armor
�7and a Void Sword or you can rely
�7on help from friends.
�7Craft Leather, Iron, Gold and Diamond Armor
�7Collect Ender Armor from The End (8 pieces)
�7Craft Leaflet, Farm Suit, Mushroom, Cactus
�7and Pumpkin Armor.
�7Buy Squire, Rosetta's, Celeste, Mercenary and
�7Starlight Armor from Rosetta aswell as Angler Armor
�7(8 pieces) from the Fishing Merchant,
�7Chainmail Armor from the Iron Forger and
�7Canopy Armor from Amaury. You should also
�7collect the armor from the Foraging Questline.
�7You can get easy contribution for
�7this by breaking some Wheat in the Hub.
�7If you want faster contribution,
�7make a Sugar Cane farm in your Garden.
